context: Tests whether the agent explicitly sets the private field in tile.json rather than omitting it and accepting the default.

checklist.name: Explicit private field in tile.json
checklist.description: The tile.json contains an explicit "private" field (either true or false), not omitted.

checklist.name: Does not conflate with quality
checklist.description: No file in the tile contains text suggesting visibility is tied to quality score, validation, or any review process.

checklist.name: Creates valid tile
checklist.description: The tile has tile.json with correct required fields (name, version, summary) and docs/index.md with REST convention content.
